// Generated by github.com/romshark/datapages. DO NOT EDIT.

// Package action provides generators for datastar action hypertext references.
// These references must be used in the templates.
package action

import "strings"

// POSTPageMessagesRead references /messages/read/
func POSTPageMessagesRead(query QueryPOSTPageMessagesRead) string {
	anyQuery := query.MessageID != ""

	var b strings.Builder
	l := len("@post('/messages/read/") + len("')")
	if anyQuery {
		l += len("?")
	}
	n := 0
	if query.MessageID != "" {
		if n > 0 {
			l += len("&")
		}
		n++
		l += len("msgid=") + len(query.MessageID)
	}
	_ = n

	b.Grow(l)

	b.WriteString("@post('/messages/read/")
	if anyQuery {
		b.WriteString("?")
	}
	n = 0
	if query.MessageID != "" {
		if n > 0 {
			b.WriteString("&")
		}
		n++
		_ = n
		b.WriteString("msgid=")
		b.WriteString(query.MessageID)
	}
	b.WriteString("')")

	return b.String()
}

type QueryPOSTPageMessagesRead struct {
	MessageID string `query:"msgid"`
}
